title: P0: Knowledge Ingest Dispatcher 统一控制面：所有 raw、Obsidian vault、
summary: P0: Knowledge Ingest Dispatcher 统一控制面：所有 raw、Obsidian vault、accepted、YouTube、ChatGPT、Web、GitHub、Solar 产物必须进入同一状态机；QMD 继续确定性索引；ThunderOMLX 只做 L2 JSON-first 语义抽取；SQLite registry 作为事实

history.note: 请接手 sprint-20260524-105859：先做 PM 需求分析，不要直接派 Builder。读取 sprint-20260524-105859.contract.md，输出 sprint-20260524-105859.prd.md，必须包含用户目标、范围边界、验收标准、风险、拆分建议。完成后把 status 更新为 phase=prd_ready handoff_to=planner target_role=planner。
Workflow guard: planner must produce design.md, plan.md, and task_graph.json before builder dispatch.
PRD 补全 4 个缺失 section: 用户问题/Problem, 用户故事/User Stories, 约束/Constraints, 开放问题/Open Questions。status 保持 drafting，请 coordinator 重判 gate。

Planner refined existing PM plan/task_graph (kept N1-N8 intact, added N8 architecture_policy.package_boundary to clear lone validator warning). Wrote design.md (architecture/state-machine/registry tables/extraction contract/validator codes/circuit breaker/DoD-Node mapping) + planning.html. D9 explicitly deferred to N9 follow-up sprint; N1 schema reserves relations.kind=extract_source hook. graph-scheduler validate: ok=True errors=[] warnings=[].

required_gates: registry tables exist and migration is idempotent
CLI supports submit-event discover-raw discover-vault process-queue status
raw/vault sample documents have stable doc_id and spans
ThunderOMLX returns candidate JSON and renderer emits valid Markdown
invalid extraction never enters extracted QMD queue
watermarks visible for raw vault extracted
high validation fail rate pauses extract queue
sample pass rate >=90%, repair terminal fail <=5%
